sagemaker.domain.resourcespec.CfnAbout: Specifies the ARN's of a SageMaker image and SageMaker image version, and the instance type that the version runs on.

sagemaker.domain.resourcespec.InstanceTy.Description: The instance type that the image version runs on.   **JupyterServer apps** only support the `system` value.  For **KernelGateway apps**, the `system` value is translated to `ml.t3.medium`. KernelGateway apps also support all other values for available instance types.

sagemaker.domain.resourcespec.LifecycleC.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Lifecycle Configuration attached to the Resource.

sagemaker.domain.resourcespec.SageMakerI.Description: The ARN of the SageMaker image that the image version belongs to.
The ARN of the image version created on the instance.
